title: Auto-create lifecycle dirs in cmd_create
description: Top-level feature container for spec-791d01a3. Replaces the _require_lifecycle_dirs() guard in cmd_create with os.makedirs calls so that missing subdirectories are created on demand rather than causing an error. Covers the implementation change, new regression test, documentation updates, and a final review pass.
acceptance_criteria: spec.py create succeeds when specs/ exists but drafts/, planned/, done/ are absent
spec.py create still fails when specs/ itself does not exist
Existing behaviour is unchanged when all three lifecycle dirs are already present
SKILL.md and README.md reflect the updated behaviour
New test covers the no-subdirs case and passes alongside the existing suite
